reasoning: Moonshot's previous top model, Kimi K2, was tied for 8th place on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard in September 2025. Although Moonshot just released 'Kimi K2 Thinking' on November 6, 2025, which boasts impressive benchmark scores (especially in reasoning tasks), it is very difficult for a Chinese lab's model to surpass all top-tier models from US giants like OpenAI (GPT-5), Anthropic (Claude Opus/Sonnet 4.x), and Google (Gemini 3) on the general Chatbot Arena. Furthermore, even if Kimi K2 debuts well, it has to hold the #1 spot until December 31, 2025, an environment characterized by rapid competitive counter-releases. Additionally, the resolution criteria heavily disadvantage Moonshot in the event of a tie: it loses the alphabetical tie-breaker to Anthropic, Google, Meta, DeepSeek, and Alibaba, only winning against OpenAI and xAI. These factors combined make the probability of Moonshot being #1 on December 31 very low.
